name: Brain MRI SWI
description: Brain MRI susceptibility-weighted imaging for hemorrhage and venous detection

findings.technique: Susceptibility-weighted 3D gradient echo images were obtained.
findings.comparison: No prior MRI studies available for comparison.

sections.name: Parenchymal Hemorrhage
sections.content: No parenchymal hemorrhage identified. No areas of susceptibility artifact to suggest blood products.

sections.name: Deep Venous Sinuses
sections.content: The dural venous sinuses show [normal flow void / patent / no filling defect]. No thrombosis.

sections.name: Calcifications
sections.content: No abnormal susceptibility to suggest pathological calcifications.

impression:
1. Normal SWI study.
2. No hemorrhage or venous thrombosis identified.
